info.name: GameReason Auth Final
info.description:
Final Postman collection for the current GameReason auth/account API.

Covers:
- register positive and negative validation cases
- login positive and negative cases
- forgot password and reset password flows
- account cabinet endpoints
- get users and delete-user scenarios

This collection is self-contained and uses collection variables instead of a separate environment file.
Default base URL: http://localhost
